mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_verification_code (target, code, scene, status, request_ip, expire_time, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.target}, #{item.code}, #{item.scene}, #{item.status}, #{item.requestIp}, #{item.expireTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
